## Checklist

- [ ] **Single tool:** This PR touches only one file under `data/tools/` (one product per PR)
- [ ] **Official link:** `source_url` is the vendor’s own documentation (pricing, education, students, help, or GitHub Pack)—not a blog or coupon site
- [ ] **Matches the page:** `discount.summary` and `how_to_apply` reflect what `source_url` says today (no guessed percents or prices)
- [ ] **verified_at** is set to `YYYY-MM-DD` and is not in the future
- [ ] **Homepage:** `website` is the product’s main site (`https://`)
- [ ] **Taxonomy:** `category.l1` and `category.l2` are valid per [docs/taxonomy.md](../docs/taxonomy.md)
- [ ] **Schema:** Required fields per [docs/schema.md](../docs/schema.md)
- [ ] **No affiliates:** No referral codes, `?ref=`, or personal promo links in URLs
- [ ] **Limits documented:** Country, age, institution type, or “institutional only” called out if the vendor mentions them
- [ ] **Status:** `unverified` for new contributor listings unless a maintainer confirmed `active` on this date
